title: MedDRA Term
description: A term in the Medical Dictionary for Regulatory Activities (MedDRA) hierarchy

level.description: Hierarchy level: SOC=System Organ Class, HLGT=High Level Group Term, HLT=High Level Term, PT=Preferred Term, LLT=Lowest Level Term

current.description: Whether this term is current and not deprecated/retired

primarySOCCode.description: Code of the primary System Organ Class for this term

primarySOCName.description: Name of the primary System Organ Class

allSOCLinks.description: All SOC associations (a PT can belong to multiple SOCs)

isPrimary.description: True if this is the primary SOC pathway

x-description.SOC: System Organ Class — highest level, 27 classes (e.g., Hepatobiliary disorders)
x-description.HLGT: High Level Group Term — groups multiple HLTs
x-description.HLT: High Level Term — groups related PTs
x-description.PT: Preferred Term — distinct medical concept for use in submissions
x-description.LLT: Lowest Level Term — verbatim terms mapped to a PT
